---
title: "learn.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/skills/local/SkillLearning/learn.py"
loc: 43
complexity: 6
logic_score: 3.05
style_score: 3.86
intel_score: 6.98
overall_score: 5.15
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating SkillLearner, execute.

## Interaction Protocol
Import SkillLearner and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 7.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 11 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.sentinel._bootstrap](file://src.sentinel._bootstrap)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [src.skills.local.SkillHunter.hunter](file://src.skills.local.SkillHunter.hunter)

### Exports
- `SkillLearner`
- `execute`
